prompt: Tell me what you found so far.
expectedBadBehavior: Emit both the internal digest and the full user-facing map as separate dumps.
expectedGoodBehavior: Emit one compact scout report and keep the digest internal until handoff.

turns.text: Tell me what you found so far.
Internal digest with every finding and citation remains hidden.

Scout report: the useful surface is one compact evidence-backed report, not a digest plus map dump. What I found: P1 keeps the digest internal, P2 shows a compact report, and the full map waits for handoff.

blindspots.text: A visible digest would leak working notes rather than helping the user decide.
